title: hieracium perlongum
intro: Hieracium perlongum, a rare and lesser-known species of the Hieracium genus, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is also known as Long-stalk Hawkweed or Long-stalk Hieracium, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium perlongum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although its uses and preparation methods are not as well-documented as other medicinal plants.
